ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY, AS SUBROGEE OF ITS INSURED, MICHAEL HERRERA.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) NATHANIEL BANKS and MARCIA M. PERRY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS HERBY ORDERED AND ADJUDGED that Judgment shall be entered in favor of Plaintiff PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY, AS SUBROGEE OF ITS INSURED, MICHAEL HERRERA, against Defendnts NATHANIEL BANKS and MARCIA M. PERRY jointly and severally in the amount of $13,000.00 pursuant to California Vehicle Code Section 17151 which limits an owner's liability to $5,000.00 for property damage and $15,000.00 for personal injury. In addition, Defendant, NATHANIEL BANKS, the driver of the vehicle is liable for the remaining $1,536.64 in property damages.
Defendants NATHANIEL BANKS and MARCIA M. PERRY are jointly and severally responsible for costs in the amount of $520.00. The amount of the Judgment is as follows: $14,536.64 Principal $520.00 Costs. Total Judgment $15,056.64. No interest and attorney fees have been requested.
